anti_claim: Dependency preflight validates accepted public runtime-spine ordering and fixture presence only; it does not authorize Lean/Lake beyond the bounded public witness fixture, hosted release operations, credentialed provider calls, or secret export.

organ_lifecycle_coverage.anti_claim: Organ lifecycle coverage checks public convergence only; it does not authorize release, provider calls, source mutation, or private-data equivalence.

negative_guard_surface_refs: non-consumer notes, demos, and incidental receipts are excluded from the organ lifecycle contract unless listed in checked_surfaces
organ_lifecycle_convergence.next_reentry_condition: rerun dependency preflight after accepted organ, evidence-class, runtime-step, public authority, or fixture-manifest changes
organ_lifecycle_convergence.public_authority_boundary: consumer-contract convergence only; not release, source, proof, or provider-call authority

required_invariants: accepted organ ids equal RuntimeShell.RUNTIME_STEPS ids
accepted organ ids match first-wave acceptance rows
accepted organ ids have exactly one evidence-class row
product-spine organ ids have public authority snapshot rows
demoted drilldown organs retain runtime and fixture coverage outside the product authority spine
public command-path organs have a matching public lens row
fixture manifests and fixture inputs exist for accepted organs
external subprocess witnesses carry tool/receipt evidence refs

private_state_scan.anti_claim: Scanner terms are regression sentinels for tests and declared import rows. A pass is not a complete secret scan, credential audit, release clearance, or proof that no private material exists.

scan_scope.intended_use: Detect declared synthetic sentinel tokens and classify explicit macro-import material rows before public body import.
